experience.metaTitle: Experience | Senior Full Stack Developer & AI Consultant - Aaron Molina
experience.metaDescription: Senior full stack developer with 14+ years building React, Next.js, Jamstack, and AI-powered applications. Professional experience at companies including the LA Clippers, Miami Heat, Azamara, and Corsair.
experience.heading: Professional Experience
experience.subheadingTemplate: {yearsOfExperience}+ years as a senior full stack developer building production web experiences and AI-powered applications
experience.intro: My career spans React, Next.js, Jamstack, headless CMS, and now AI-powered development. I have shipped production code for sports teams, cruise lines, and technology companies. Here is a look at where I have been and what I have built.

coreCompetencies.title: Full stack web development with modern frameworks
coreCompetencies.description: Build scalable applications with React, Next.js, Astro, TanStack Start, and Node.js.

coreCompetencies.title: AI-powered development with Claude Code, OpenAI, and MCP
coreCompetencies.description: Ship production applications using AI agents and modern AI tooling.

coreCompetencies.title: Headless CMS architecture and implementation
coreCompetencies.description: Design content platforms with Sanity, Storyblok, and Strapi that content teams love.

coreCompetencies.title: CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
coreCompetencies.description: Automate builds, tests, and deployments with GitHub Actions, Docker, and cloud platforms.

coreCompetencies.title: Performance optimization and Core Web Vitals
coreCompetencies.description: Improve load times and UX through measurable performance work and best practices.

coreCompetencies.title: Cross-functional team collaboration and consulting
coreCompetencies.description: Partner with design, product, and engineering teams or lead projects independently.

contact.metaTitle: Contact | Hire a Full Stack Jamstack Developer - Aaron Molina
contact.metaDescription: Looking to hire a full stack developer? Get in touch to discuss your React, Next.js, Astro, or AI-powered project. Remote US or Miami, FL based. Open to work.
contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.intro: Looking for a full stack developer who can build with AI, ship fast, and deliver production-grade results? I would love to hear about your project and explore how we can work together.
